### Pre-review checklist
- [ ] I've confirmed that instructions included in README.md are still correct after my changes in the codebase.
- [ ] I've added or updated unit tests to verify correctness of my new code.
- [ ] I've added or updated integration tests to verify correctness of my new code.
- [ ] I've confirmed my changes are working by executing CLI commands manually on macOS.
- [ ] I've confirmed my changes are working by executing CLI commands manually on Windows.
- [ ] I've confirmed my changes are up-to-date with the target branch.
- [ ] I've described my changes in `RELEASE-NOTES.md` (see [when and how](docs/contributing/lifecycle.md#release-notes)).
- [ ] I've updated documentation if behavior changed.
